complete.description: True iff every objective requirement is covered by inspected evidence.

missing_requirements.description: One entry per requirement that is missing, incomplete, or weakly verified. MUST be empty (length 0) when complete=true; the consumer enforces this cross-field invariant via jq because OpenAI structured-outputs schema dialect does not support if/then/else.

evidence_checked.description: One entry per piece of real evidence inspected (file:lines, command output, test result, PR state). MUST contain at least one entry when complete=true; the consumer enforces this conditional invariant via jq because OpenAI structured-outputs schema dialect does not support if/then/else.
